status.label: Status
status.sync_toggle_unsaved: sync toggle is using unsaved settings; click Save to persist these values
status.oauth_dialog_closed_after_import: oauth dialog closed after account import
status.browser_auth_url_not_ready: Browser authorization URL is not ready yet
status.no_browser_auth_url: No browser authorization URL to copy
status.no_device_verification_url: No device verification URL to copy
status.failed_copy_browser_url: Failed to copy browser authorization URL
status.failed_copy_device_url: Failed to copy device verification URL
status.telemetry_unavailable: account added, but usage telemetry is unavailable: {message}
status.telemetry_queue_no_accounts: telemetry refresh queue: no accounts available
status.browser_oauth_completed: browser oauth completed and account imported
status.device_oauth_completed: device oauth completed and account imported
status.auto_telemetry_refresh_failed: usage telemetry auto-refresh failed after reset: {name}
status.locked_routing_pool_failed: Failed to update locked routing pool
status.oauth_succeeded_refresh_failed: OAuth succeeded but account refresh failed

router.pool_sort_reset_soon_desc: Free uses weekly reset, paid uses hourly/5-hour reset.
router.pool_sort_most_quota_desc: Show highest remaining plan-relevant quota first.
router.pool_toggle_lock_group: Toggle routing lock group (Shift+click to multi-add)
router.ledger_no_routes: No routes match the current account and search filter.
router.trace_empty: No request logs available yet. Send traffic through the proxy to build a trace.
router.trace_diagnosis_ok: Request completed through the selected account.
router.trace_diagnosis_warn: Request completed with a routing or upstream warning.
router.trace_diagnosis_error: Request failed on the highlighted stage.
router.inspector_select_route: Select a route to inspect routing details.

collaboration.parallel_session_title: {count} Codex sessions are pinned to this account
collaboration.account_sessions_title: {count} active sessions are pinned to this account

trace.title: Request routing trace
trace.detail_empty: Select a request to inspect its route.

accounts.detail_choose_account: Choose an account from the list to view details
accounts.detail_no_historical_telemetry: No historical usage telemetry in DB yet

sessions.title: Account affinity
sessions.no_matching: No affinities match the current filter.

settings.title: Settings
settings.routing_strategy_desc: Load balancing algorithm and composite scoring weights
settings.routing_strategy_sublabel: How requests are distributed across eligible accounts
settings.sticky_threads_desc: Pin related requests to the same upstream account
settings.prefer_earlier_reset_desc: Bias traffic toward accounts whose quota resets sooner
settings.strict_lock_pool_desc: Force continuation requests to stay inside a locked routing pool
settings.cache_affinity_ttl_desc: How long prompt-cache sticky mappings stay alive
settings.account_import_desc: Load accounts and login credentials from a SQLite snapshot with a delta preview before import.
settings.import_source_db_desc: Open the import dialog to review account/login changes before applying.
settings.import_without_overwrite_desc: Keep existing accounts when importing duplicates.
settings.firewall_desc: When entries exist, only listed IPs can reach the proxy. Empty list allows all traffic.
settings.db_security_desc: Rotate the database password used for your local `store.db` and encrypted account token payloads.
settings.db_change_password_desc: You must provide the current passphrase. Keep the new passphrase safe, recovery is not possible.
settings.db_new_passphrase_min: New passphrase must be at least 8 characters.
settings.db_passphrase_mismatch: New passphrase and confirmation do not match.
settings.db_passphrase_same: New passphrase must differ from current passphrase.
settings.db_passphrase_changed: Database passphrase changed for this running session.
settings.db_export_database_desc: Save a copy of the local database to a file. The export includes all accounts, tokens, and settings.
settings.db_sync_desc: Bidirectional sync between instances using journaled change replication with conflict resolution.
settings.db_sync_enable_desc: Activate bidirectional replication with a remote instance
settings.db_sync_instance_id_desc: Unique site identifier for this node
settings.db_sync_port_desc: TCP port for peer replication traffic
settings.db_sync_peer_discovery_desc: Find instances on the local network via mDNS (Bonjour/Avahi)
settings.db_sync_cluster_name_desc: Only sync with peers advertising the same cluster
settings.db_sync_discovered_peers_desc: Instances currently visible to this node
settings.db_sync_interval_desc: Seconds between sync cycles (0 = manual trigger)
settings.db_sync_conflict_resolution_desc: Strategy when both instances modify the same row
settings.db_sync_journal_retention_desc: Days to keep change journal entries before compaction
settings.db_sync_transport_encryption_desc: TLS for sync traffic between instances
settings.db_sync_handshake_auth_desc: Require signed peer handshakes with a shared cluster secret
settings.db_sync_cluster_secret_desc: Pre-shared secret used for handshake HMAC authentication
settings.db_sync_tls_verify_peer_desc: Validate peer certificate chain for sync connections
settings.db_sync_tls_ca_path_desc: PEM file used to verify peer certificate chain
settings.db_sync_tls_cert_chain_path_desc: Node certificate chain PEM presented to peers
settings.db_sync_tls_private_key_path_desc: Private key PEM paired with the cert chain
settings.db_sync_schema_version_desc: Local protocol/schema version advertised to peers
settings.db_sync_min_supported_schema_desc: Reject peers below this schema version
settings.db_sync_allow_schema_downgrade_desc: Permit negotiated downgrade to a lower compatible schema
settings.db_sync_peer_probe_enabled_desc: Run lifecycle transport probes during peer refresh
settings.db_sync_peer_probe_interval_desc: Minimum interval between probe attempts for the same peer
settings.db_sync_peer_probe_timeout_desc: Timeout used for per-attempt transport handshake probes
settings.db_sync_max_probes_desc: Bound probe work per refresh cycle to avoid bursts
settings.db_sync_fail_closed_desc: Mark peers unreachable after repeated failed probes
settings.db_sync_fail_closed_aria: Toggle sync peer probe fail closed
settings.db_sync_fail_closed_threshold_desc: Consecutive probe failures required before fail-closed state applies
settings.db_sync_lag_detail_note: Detailed lag, ingress, and peer metrics are in View topology → Stats.

dialogs.add_account_browser_desc: Opens a browser window for OpenAI authentication via PKCE
dialogs.add_account_device_desc: Enter a code on another device. For headless or remote setups
dialogs.add_account_import_desc: Upload an existing auth.json file with pre-exported credentials
dialogs.add_account_drop_json: Drop auth.json here or click to browse
dialogs.add_account_drop_json_hint: JSON file with tokens, lastRefreshAt, and optional OPENAI_API_KEY
dialogs.add_account_remote_server_label: Remote server? Paste the callback URL after sign-in:
dialogs.add_account_device_enter_code: Enter this code at the verification page:
dialogs.add_account_import_missing_email: Import file must include an account email
dialogs.auth_footnote: OAuth callback server control is tied to
dialogs.about_description: Live account routing and telemetry for desktop operations.
dialogs.unsaved_message: You have unsaved changes in Settings. Save before leaving this page?
dialogs.account_import_hero_title: Import accounts from a SQLite workspace snapshot
dialogs.account_import_hero_desc: Drop a .sqlite or .db file, inspect account and login deltas, then apply only reviewed changes.
dialogs.account_import_drop_text: Drop SQLite database here or click to browse
dialogs.account_import_source_key_hint: Enter the source key, then run Rescan to validate encrypted login tokens.
dialogs.account_import_source_db_pass_hint: Enter the password for the imported database, then run Rescan.
dialogs.oauth_completed_no_account: OAuth completed, but no account is visible yet. Please retry.
dialogs.oauth_verify_failed: Failed to verify OAuth status after callback
dialogs.oauth_callback_not_confirmed: OAuth callback was received, but completion was not confirmed
dialogs.oauth_start_failed: Failed to start OAuth browser flow
dialogs.oauth_device_expired: Device code expired. Please try again.

error_boundary.title: Renderer crashed
error_boundary.message: Something went wrong in the UI. You can reset the screen and continue.

common.routing_mode_round_robin_desc: Cycle through eligible accounts in fixed order. Ignores load, latency, and quota.
common.routing_mode_weighted_round_robin_desc: Deficit-based round robin with usage-weighted fairness to spread load smoothly.
common.routing_mode_drain_hop_desc: Stick to one routed account until it is exhausted, then hop to the next eligible account.
